chunks.title: CSS Object-fit and Object-cover
chunks.text: Today we will talk about object fit and object position properties.

chunks.title: CSS Object-fit and Object-cover
chunks.text: Sometimes we have to keep an image in a container like this

chunks.title: CSS Object-fit and Object-cover
chunks.text: such that it gets covered in its width

chunks.title: CSS Object-fit and Object-cover
chunks.text: or it gets fit by maintaining its aspect ratio in that entire container.

chunks.title: CSS Object-fit and Object-cover
chunks.text: To do such things, we use object fit property.

chunks.title: CSS Object-fit and Object-cover
chunks.text: And I will also tell you about object cover property in detail in this video.
